title.en: It's just that his Extreme Dao will has improve...

content.en:
Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian used a lot of resources to improve his cultivation, but starting from the perfect controller of the True Realm, there were too many resources needed to improve his cultivation.

Even if he had obtained countless resources from the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm at the beginning, most of the resources were still very low-end, and for him now, the efficiency was very average.

Therefore, it is a bit unrealistic for him to rely on these resources to quickly improve his strength now.

Of course, Ye Tian could enter the Primordial Black Sea and refine his whole body step by step through the energy of the Primordial Black Sea, and his cultivation speed was not slow.

It's just that his Extreme Dao will has improved slowly, not as fast as before.

After a long period of time, although Ye Tian's cultivation has not yet been promoted to the limit of the perfect controller of the True Realm, his strength has still improved a lot, and he has created several top extreme control techniques.

Not only that, Ye Tian continued to use causal resources to comprehend, and finally comprehended the extreme path of cause and effect to the extreme realm.

Rumble!!!!

The Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect had reached the extreme realm, and Ye Tian could use the Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect to lock on to any cultivator who had a causal relationship with him at this moment, so as to snoop and find them, but they couldn't detect it.

"Let's try to find the Stone Dragon Demon Lord!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In an instant, a causal line connected to the Stone Dragon Demon Lord appeared in front of Ye Tian, connecting the two places.

Soon, two stone dragon demon lords appeared in his causal perception.

One is at the end of the world, and the other is in the extreme deep sea.

"I didn't expect that the Extreme Cause and Effect Extreme Dao could cross the end of the realm and the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, so as to find the Stone Dragon Demon Lord, in this way, if I want to deal with the Stone Dragon Demon Lord, he has nowhere to escape!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

I have to say that the extreme path of cause and effect in the extreme realm is indeed too terrifying!

Subsequently, Ye Tian used the Cause and Effect Extreme Extreme to find the Lord of Time, and they all found it.

However, Ye Tian didn't spy on the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, and if he was discovered, it would be embarrassing.

At this time, Ye Tian took out the mysterious armor fragment on his body, and he wanted to try to find other armor fragments from this armor fragment with the cause and effect pole.

Although he has now comprehended the Extreme Realm Defense Pole, this armor fragment is of high value, and he can completely use it to trade with other Extreme Realm Perfect Masters to obtain the resources he needs!

"Try it!"

Ye Tian pinched the armor fragments in his hand, urging the Cause and Effect Extreme Dao.

Rumble!!!

A picture was presented in front of Ye Tian.

There are six pictures in the end of the world, and there are twelve pictures in the extreme deep sea.

And Ye Tian also sensed that there were armor fragments in the Primordial Black Sea, but those fragments were too deep in the Primordial Black Sea, and even if it was the Extreme Cause and Effect Extreme, it was difficult to spy on such a deep place.

Ye Tian tried to constantly spy on the Primordial Black Sea, but in the end, he only found a fragment of armor before he could consume his strength.

"That's the only way, the Primordial Black Sea is too mysterious, even with my extreme causal path, I can't probe too far. Ye Tian muttered.

This time, although he had detected the location of many armor fragments, some of them were owner's items, and even in the hands of some Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, he couldn't get them at all.

Moreover, those Extreme Realm Perfect Masters may have exhausted the Extreme Defense Extreme Path contained in the fragments, so they are of little value.

There were only five pieces of armor that could really be held by him, including one in the Primordial Black Sea, three in the Realm End, and one on the Extreme Deep Sea.

"Get the piece of the Primordial Black Sea first!"

Ye Tian immediately retreated into the Black Sea in the distance, escaped into the location point closest to the fragment of armor, and then began to shuttle continuously.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian traveled nearly an eternal year before arriving at the location of the fragment of armor.

And in the meantime, he has repositioned himself countless times.

Primordial Black Sea.

Ye Tian came over and sensed it here.

Soon, he reached out and grabbed a piece of armor from it.

"It's really hard to find, if it weren't for me cultivating the Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect to the extreme realm, otherwise I wouldn't be able to find this fragment at all. Even if it is other Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, who have mastered the Extreme Extreme Dao of the Perfection Realm, they will not be able to find this piece of armor fragment!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

In fact, when he cultivated the Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect to the Perfection Realm, he also tried to spy on the fragments of armor, but failed.

The grade of this kind of thing is very high, and even the Perfection Cause and Effect Pole Path cannot spy on its cause and effect line, and only the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect in the Extreme Realm can barely spy on its cause and effect line.

Today, this piece of armor is still here, and it has not been taken.

Well, suffice it to say a thing.

That is, so far, there has not been a perfect controller of the Extreme Realm who has cultivated the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect to the extreme realm.

There is no Extreme Dao Deep Sea, and there is no end of the realm, he is the only living being who has cultivated the Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect to the extreme realm.

"This piece of armor fragment has not been used yet, and the extreme defense pole contained inside it is very rich, and the piece I got before is dozens of times better!"

Ye Tian said happily.

Immediately, he escaped from the primordial Black Sea to the end of the realm, and began to search for the three pieces of armor that he could obtain.

......

Darkblood.

This is not an eternal world, it is a special area at the end of the world, and it is also a treasure place for many creatures at the end of the world to live.

When Ye Tian descended here, countless creatures at the end of the realm sensed it.

Among these creatures of the Realm are countless Eternal Masters, as well as many half-step Perfect Masters, and several Perfect Masters.

Under normal circumstances, even the perfect controller would not dare to set foot here.

Ye Tian crossed over step by step and came to an ancient blood mountain in the Dark Blood Domain.

At this time, the Three-Headed Realm Creature in the Ancient Blood Mountain flew out and tried to stop Ye Tian.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian exuded his own aura.

Suddenly, these three-headed creatures trembled, and obediently gave way, not daring to stop them.

I saw Ye Tianyi stretch out his hand, tear apart the ancient blood mountain, grab a piece of armor fragment left here, and immediately fled directly.

Seeing this scene, the creatures of the Three-Headed Realm were extremely angry.

"Our holy relics have been taken!"

"Shhh, that one is not something we can provoke, although we have all reached the realm of a high-level perfect controller, but that one is definitely not a super-perfect master, but an existence above a super-perfect master, not something we can provoke!"

"Forget it, after such an infinite number of years, we can't get close to the holy relics, the creatures that touch the holy relics are dead, and if they are gone, they will be gone!"

"But if there is a holy artifact, we may have the hope of comprehending the Extreme Path of Defense, so as to advance to the super-perfect master!"

"Compared with the holy relics, life is still important, so I can only admit it!"

......

"This piece of armor fragment is not consumed, those creatures at the end of the realm can't get close to this armor fragment at all, and they can't consume the extreme defense power inside it!"

Ye Tian said with satisfaction.

Immediately, he began to move on to the next location.
